---
id: get-chat-messages
title: "Get chat messages"
description: "Retrieves a list of messages from a chat. Supports cursor-based pagination via before_order_id and after_order_id query parameters."
sidebar_label: "Get chat messages"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/2025-11-08/anytype-api

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get chat messages"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats/{chat_id}/messages"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a list of messages from a chat. Supports cursor-based pagination via before_order_id and after_order_id query parameters.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
